name: Alomana
oneliner: Alomana deploys autonomous AI agents that automate portfolio rebalancing, harvest tax losses, minimize transaction costs, and maintain target risk profiles across thousands of client accounts simultaneously.
finserv: Directly serves wealth managers with portfolio optimization — tax-loss harvesting, rebalancing, and after-tax return maximization across thousands of accounts. The exact product description Dave gave as the ideal Tax Optimisation candidate.
team: Limited public information. EU-based seed stage.
thesis: HIGH UNCERTAINTY. Alomana is exactly the kind of specialist agent that would sit in the app store marketplace — a tax/rebalancing agent serving investors through wealth managers. But it could also be classified as an internal workflow tool for RIAs automating their own operations. The internal/external boundary is ambiguous. If Dave sees this as 'an agent that helps investors with clever tax strategies' → potential first Tax Optimisation upvote. If he sees it as 'a tool for wealth managers to automate rebalancing' → internal workflow rejection.
